hotel_name: Khách sạn Brilliant Bay Nha Trang (Brilliant Bay Nha Trang Hotel)

reviews.title: Terrible service
reviews.text:
After arriving at this hotel we experienced one thing after the other. There is a lot so that to save time i will bullet point them.
* Shower had zero pressure in our room we asked to fix and the maintenance man just changed the setting on the shower did not fix the problem 
* The ac was not cold in the slightest
* When we asked for more than one towel they said it was impossible because its against there policy lol we needed a spare one because it was soo difficult to get dry in the humid room this is the first hotel that has ever refused me a spare towel 
* Inconsiderate staff especially the house keeping
* Filthy bed headboard and windows inside the room god knows when they last bothered to clean them 
* Asks for extra pillows they said they only had one spare which in a 16 story hotel was obviously a lie when they gave us the pillow it did not have a cover on. Im not sure why basic hygiene is so much of struggle within this country 
* To top it all off when they gave us our laundry back they did not have the common sense to separate black from white and did not bother to fold the clothes they have honestly got to have monkey brains to think that this is acceptable

before I arrived to Nha Trang, i wanted to confirm my booking and arrange earlier check in. No one ever replied me, tho i texted 2 days before the actual date of arrival.
when i arrived at 7am, i was informed that early check was impossible. ok, i had been waiting. at 2pm i was told smth else, smth like: your room is without window. nevertheless on the pictures my room was indeed without a window. ok, then i started to check the description of the room, when the reception said: give me your passport now!” and started to reach to passport attempting to grab it from my hands. it was quite weird. 
i stayed in the hotel because i was really tired after a night trip. if i had  more time i wouldn’t stay at this hotel

reviews.title: Wouldn't come back
reviews.positives: The hotel itself is not bad, if only a little deeper into the tourist strip than it seems on the map. Overall it's a decent stay for the money. It's close enough to the beach, but doesn't have any decent places to eat around, just tourist crap.
reviews.negatives: Now, the front desk lost my reservation and tried to kick me out in the middle of my stay or put me in some disgusting place across the street. I understand, Tet, price gauging, but I reserved the room weeks ago. Still had to leave one day early. The room had a persistent sewage smell every time I would come in to change for lunch. The cleaning quality was so-so, upon checking in, I found used toothpicks on the floor and some very dusty dried flowers inside the desk. At least no hair on the pillow.

reviews.title: A disappointment
reviews.positives: The rooms are clean and decent. Breakfast is not the greatest, but still acceptable.
reviews.negatives: This hotel has been a disappointment. It seems it once used to be a cozy place like the photos show when it was called BB Hotel and new, however now it looks more like a neglected place. The rooms are still okay and clean, however the shared spaces and facilities look run down and lack proper maintenance. The rooftop terrace looks more like an abandoned construction wharf with rust, broken equipment and quick repairs all over the place. No towels, no staff to be seen up there and a dusty bar which was empty. The experience with the staff was so-so. They seemed very focused on collecting fees and payments, less on guests' experience. On early check in they said to come back at check in time only, then somewhat later the rooms were suddenly ready but only upon payment of a fee. When asked for a supplementary breakfast before check in, they announced a double price for non-hotel guests which only came down when pointing out we were hotel guests and we were aware of the regular breakfast price. Payment by credit card only at a fee (never seen this before in a hotel). Regular water in the room at a fee.

reviews.title: Worse service ever
reviews.text:
Worse service ever.
The receptionists are rude.
Even when you call the reception to get the room cleaned, it is not.
There’s so much miscommunication between the reception and the cleaning staff. When you ask for the room to be clean around 10am, at 3:55pm, it is still not done and then they tell you the cleaning staff stops at 4pm.

The breakfast is not fresh at all. The tomatoes smelled rotten and cucumbers were from the day before for sure.

We wanted to book a nice room so we booked the one with « a private balcony ». What a joke. You cannot even put a chair properly on the so called balcony.

Overall, I would not recommend this place at all. The service is really bad and the staff has bad attitude.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: This is the first time I am writing a review. The hotel is clean, but the air conditioner is broken and not cool; I woke up sweating like I had just bathed. There's a part of the ceiling of the air conditioner that is coming off with a scary visible hole. I booked a room with a balcony, but I can't access it. The soundproofing is poor, and several wooden panels for insulation have fallen off. The kettle has a 3-pin plug; I called twice and waited over 30 minutes for staff to assist me with a converter. The hairdryer is extremely loud and takes a long time to dry my hair. The cleaning staff did not replenish the bottled water for guests. The swimming pool on the rooftop is dirty, and the surrounding area is the same. The hotel is rated 4 stars, but I feel it does not meet 4-star quality.

reviews.title: Do not stay here...
reviews.text: Just because the hotel says they are newly renovated... it does not mean they have renovated everything!  Carpet in hallway, old and dirty, roll up curtains that do not work, old AC that does not work.... faucet broken on the bathtub....  and the room they first gave us... had 3 AC units placed outside one of our windows!!!  Who can sleep with 3 AC units going all night?   We asked to change rooms....but it was soo difficult.... because one room AC do not work... another room curtains broken etc.  and we had to wait for them to fix things!!  and the attitude of the receptionist not very nice....  so dont pay for the room until you have seen the room.... and get a room high up if not you will not have a view and look into a wall!

Stay at your own risk but the price maybe makes it worth, it's a 50/50 gamble I think.

reviews.text: Overall, for the price, the hotel has a prime location, only about 150m from the beach. reviews.title: The room is quite small and the view is not as expected.
reviews.text: The location is okay, crowded, and the staff is friendly. The room cleaning is confusing. They clean the room every day but don't refill the cotton swabs and the cleaning is also superficial. Early in the morning, because of the rain, we couldn't go out to eat, so we bought instant noodles and pizza. When they cleaned the room, the first thing they did was enter quietly and then whispered, "The smell of noodles is terrible." First of all, I had already turned on the air purifier and second, opened the window. In just about 30 minutes, the smell was gone without any issues. With this kind of cleaning attitude, I can’t accept it; it’s not like I only eat in the room while traveling—who goes on a trip just to stay in the room and eat? Moreover, the rules say not to eat smelly foods like durian or grilled meat, which can leave a lingering smell, but noodles can be easily dealt with.

Das Zimmer war deutlich dunkler als dargestellt, obwohl wir ausdrücklich ein Zimmer mit Balkon gebucht hatten. Zudem war die Sauberkeit unzureichend:
 Es war sehr staubig, insbesondere über dem Bettkopf, wo sich deutlich sichtbarer Schmutz befand. Darüber hinaus war die Bettwäsche an einer Stelle zerrissen.

Ein weiterer großer Kritikpunkt war der Lärmpegel. Trotz unserer Unterbringung in der 6. Etage war es nachts aufgrund von Partys sehr laut und morgens kam zusätzlicher Lärm durch eine Baustelle direkt neben dem Gebäude hinzu.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Nachdem der junge Herr an der Rezeption uns 4-5 Mal gebeten hat eine gute Bewertung zu hinterlassen hatten wir dies auch vor. Allerdings hat der Mann, der in der Tiefgarage unter dem Hotel, die Roller und Motorräder lagert unsere Meinung geändert.
Am Vorabend haben wir unseren geliehenen Roller vor dem hotel auf dem Bürgersteig stehen gelassen, weil wir nicht sicher waren ob wir ihn später nochmal benutzen würden, um was zu essen zu gehen. Am nächsten Morgen allerdings war der Roller weg. Wir suchten die Straße kurz ab, weil wir ihn gerade wieder zurückbringen wollten. Als wir schließlich runter in die Garage gingen und schauen wollten, ob ihn jemand runter geschoben hat, meinte der Mann zu uns dass der Roller weg sei und es unsere Schuld wäre. Auf dem Weg raus hat er uns nochmal angehalten und meinte er könnte uns in einer Stunde den Roller auftreiben. Als ich fragte woher er wisse wo der Roller ist, meinte er, dass er mit jemand zusammen arbeitet, der wisse wo der Roller ist. Als ich fragte woher er das denn wisse meinte er, dass wir ihm folgen sollten. Es wurde ziemlich schnell klar, dass die beiden den Roller verschwinden lassen haben und jetzt Lösegeld dafür wollten. Ganz schön traurig wenn man daran denkt, dass der Mann beim Hotel Arbeit und mit seinem Nachbar-Freund Roller der Hotelgäste klaut und Lösegeld für diese verlangt...
Leider hat diese Aktion, die ganzen Erfahrungen im Hotel ruiniert. Ach ja. Das Frühstück war auch jeden Morgen so gut wie leer, obwohl wir nicht die letzten waren.

reviews.title: The room offers great value for money.
reviews.text:
The cost-performance ratio of the room is very high, the room is clean and tidy, there is a garage downstairs for parking motorcycles, and someone is watching over it so there's no fear of theft. 
Every day someone comes to collect the garbage, make the beds, and replenish the water, but I’m not quite used to having a mirror opposite the bed. 
There are many thieves in the Agarwood Square in Nha Trang; my bag was stolen there, and the staff gave me the address to go to the police station to report it. The police here don’t really care, and there’s no surveillance, so the possibility of finding it is low. A cleaner found my documents in a trash can, which included my room key, and returned it to the hotel. Thanks to this guy!
I hope everyone takes good care of their belongings and has fun here!

reviews.title: Evaluation
reviews.text: The hotel is in a beautiful location. There are many amenities around. The price is also reasonable. The only issue is that my room's bathroom has a bit of an odor, even though I have used air freshener and flushed normally, and the cleaning staff comes daily, yet it's still the same. Oh, and there's a nearby drink shop that also does laundry, so it's best to avoid it. The laundry service is just okay, but they quote 25,000 VND per kilogram. My mom and I had 1.5 kg of laundry, which should have cost 40,000 VND, but they immediately asked for 50,000 VND, even though my mom had done laundry there before and they said it would be 40,000 VND. The next day, I went out with the same 1.5 kg, and they still wanted 50,000 VND.

reviews.title: Experience Nha Trang in July 2025
reviews.text: Good hotel for the price. I booked this room on Agoda for only 350K/night, the room is clean, new, and for the price, it’s absolutely amazing, including breakfast. You should choose this place and TND Hotel as your accommodation when visiting Nha Trang; if there are rooms available, you should book immediately without hesitation because someone else might take it. I experienced this, so on the last night, I had to move to another hotel that was more expensive but had much worse service. Here, if you drive a car, parking costs 60K/night because the hotel doesn't have a parking lot, which is very inconvenient as the street is narrow. Soundproofing is a bit poor; you can hear conversations from the floor above.

reviews.text:
Nice location!
Nice clean rooms! 
Beach is beautiful , clean and has great walking paths. 
Don’t get the breakfast here though. Lukewarm cheap coffee, no  creamer. 
No covers on what fruits were out and flies were going for it! 
Got an omelette and it was pretty greasy. No real butter served.
The room is nice but could use a plug in on the counter where the kettle is. I had to crawl under the counter and place it on the floor to plug it in. Also, the bathroom has no plug in either. 
Room gets very hot while you’re out bc of the electric card you have to insert upon returning. Takes a while to cool it down again. 
Lots of shops and good restaurants nearby. Easy to get around to the attractions!

reviews.title: ✨ Review KIM THANH BOUTIQUE HOTEL NHA TRANG ✨
reviews.text:
Mình vừa có dịp lưu trú tại Kim Thanh Boutique Hotel ở Nha Trang và trải nghiệm khá ấn tượng.

📍 Vị trí: Khách sạn nằm ở vị trí thuận tiện, dễ dàng di chuyển đến biển và các điểm tham quan trong thành phố.

💰 Giá cả: So với mặt bằng chung ở Nha Trang thì giá ở đây rất hợp lý, phù hợp cho cả du lịch cá nhân lẫn gia đình.

🏨 Phòng ốc & tiện nghi: Phòng sạch sẽ, đầy đủ tiện nghi cơ bản, thoải mái cho kỳ nghỉ ngắn ngày.

🤝 Nhân viên: Thái độ phục vụ nhiệt tình, thân thiện, luôn hỗ trợ khách hàng khi cần.

🚗 Điểm trừ nhỏ: Thủ tục thuê xe hơi hơi mất thời gian, nếu cải thiện nhanh hơn thì sẽ tuyệt vời hơn nữa.

👉 Tổng kết: Đây là một khách sạn đáng để trải nghiệm nếu bạn cần một nơi ở giá tốt, vị trí thuận tiện và dịch vụ chu đáo tại Nha Trang.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel for a good price
reviews.text:
I enjoyed 1 night here so far.  I'm not sure why Agoda is asking for a review when I'm not done here.   I'm a solo backpacker who normally stays in budget (lower class) hotels and this hotel greatly exceeds those.  There's a roof top pool and I've never had one of those.  Hotels in Vietnam are cheap and so I was able to enjoy a very good place for cheap.  No issues.  

It's located in an area where there are lots of hotels along the beach.  There are a lot of Russian tourists here which is a bit of a surprise.  

There is not a lot of English spoken around there and so you will have be patient and friendly and ask lots of people before getting an answer if you, like me, speak only English.  

This place is also a bit of a walk from the downtown area but a Grab motorbike ride is cheap and fun.  

I recommend this place.

reviews.title: Amazing!!
reviews.text:
I stayed here for nearly a month, and honestly, it was one of the best decisions I made. For around £300, the value for money is incredible. The hotel offers great facilities, including a rooftop pool with an amazing view — easily one of my favourite spots to relax. The only thing I’d say is that it would be even better if the pool bar was up and running, as it feels like a missed opportunity.

The hotel has two elevators, which are quick and efficient, so getting around is never an issue. The housekeeping staff were excellent — always friendly, polite, and did a great job keeping everything clean. The reception team were also fantastic: welcoming, helpful, and always ready to assist with anything I needed.

One of the highlights for me was the rooftop pool — not just for the view, but also because I met a lot of great people there who ended up becoming good friends. It really added to the whole experience.

The location is perfect. The beach is literally a 3-minute walk away, and you’re surrounded by shops, restaurants, and massage spots everywhere you go. Everything you need is right on your doorstep, which made the whole experience even better.

Overall, my experience here was excellent. One thing I do want to mention is the staff — they work long hours and deal with all kinds of people every day. I did notice a few guests being quite disrespectful at times, especially towards reception, which is disappointing. People need to remember that the staff are human beings, just doing their jobs, with their own lives and challenges. A little respect goes a long way.

I genuinely loved my stay here and would 100% come back if I return to Vietnam. I would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting.

Cảm ơn 😁

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Здравствуйте, отель заявляет себя как 4 звезды, хотя я бы ему и двух с половиной бы не поставил. Я когда бронировал на букинге, там было четко указано что номер с видом на город. При заселении сказали что номер будет вообще без окон. Если бы я путешествовал один, я бы на месте развернулся бы и ушел искать другой отель, но со мной была мама, и не очень хотелось качели устраивать , надо было скорее уже куда то прибиться, да и она сказала что , как и мне, ей все равно куда заселят  по большому счету. 
На ресепшене персонал супер тупой, и медленный . даже на почте россии быстрее персонал шевелится.
В номере кондиционер еле работал, то сначала дул ледяным , то потом теплым. В итоге я наверное из-за этого ночью и заболел. Две лампочки на потолке почти погасли, те кто убирался в номере это видел, даже руками на них показывали, но все хер забили . Я тоже никуда обращаться не стал, ибо уже знаю с кем дело имею. Благо заселились всего на 6 дней. 
В ванной душевая перегородка, когда душ принимаешь, то все помещение в воде плавает. 
В здании 17 этажей, всего два лифта. Пока дождешься лифт, можно состариться. 
Завтраки были включены, но о них ничего сверхъестественного не скажу. Еда скудная. До этого были отеле тройке на севере Нячанга, так там кормили на порядок лучше, выбор еды был больше, и кофе вкуснее. 
Ну и под занавес: когда мы съезжали с номера, с нас потребовали 90 донгов за воду, которую мы выпили в номере. За ВОДУ, Карл ! 
Я ей в переводчике показал что вы бы не позорились, ей Богу. 
Да и в целом район расположения отеля - полное дно. 
Реально лучше жить на севере Нячанга, нет толп туристов и суеты как центре.
Извиняюсь за долгий и эмоциональный рассказ, может кого то предостережет от необдуманного поступка , чтобы забронировать тут номер.
Фото не делал.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Отвратительное отношение персонала к гостям: про заселении никто из персонала не проводил и не объяснил как пользоваться кондиционерами в номере, из-за чего вышло недоразумение, которое также было улажено с сотрудником, который общался на повышенных тонах. Девушка на ресепшене затребовала в залог паспорт или 500 000 - хотя я предварительно писала и спрашивала про залог, на что мне был прислан ответ: залог в отеле не берется. 
Никто из персонала не здоровается при встрече. При выселении мне пришлось ждать, пока проверят комнату, видимо, на наличие 4 бутылок воды, которые были указаны как «мини-бар». 
Мебель в номере «усталая», холодильник отсутствует, есть небольшой шкафчик типа холодильника, в котором практически ничего не охлаждается. По вечерам (до 22.00) с улицы была слышна громкая музыка, пение караоке. Также периодически в номере было слышно звуки канализации из соседних номеров. А из туалета в самом номере воняло тухлым, приходилось закрывать дверь и включать вентиляцию. 
Завтрак очень бедный, предназначен в основном для гостей из Азии. 
Не советую этот отель. Рядом очень много других отелей дешевле и лучше во всех отношениях.

Санузел: вентиляция работает плохо, постоянно пахло канализацией, проветрить такой возможности нет (мы купили освежитель воздуха). После приёма душа всё помещение в воде, отток воды работает ужасно.

reviews.positives: Отличный отель для этой стоимости. Удобная постель, толстые белоснежные полотенца. Уютные номера.
reviews.negatives:
Накануне меня отказались заселять, поэтому занижаю оценку. Я забронировал номер. Но фото был номер с окном. Но при заезде мне сказали, что номер без окна. В описании про отсутствие окна тоже ничего не сказано. Я требовал номер с окном, протянул свой телефон, чтобы показать, что на фото есть окно. Тогда сотрудница взяла мой телефон и попыталась отменить бронь. Я выхватил телефон и сказал, что если ситуация принимает такой оборот, тогда пусть сами и отменяют. Мне пришлось искать другой отель. Жалко потраченных 2,5 часов ожидания заселения. Кстати, в раннем заселении мне тоже отказали, хотя эта услуга была включена в стоимость номера. 

Еще один минус – грязный кондиционер. 
Пляжных полотенец не хватает всем гостям.

Заезд в отель на 2 дня, без завтраков.
Вывод: если ещё раз приеду в нячанг, согласен заселиться сюда
reviews.positives: Чистота в номере, тихо (окна были во двор), есть бассейн на крыше. Есть чайник, кофе, вода. В номере есть кондиционер, но при этом окна и высота (11 этаж нашего номера) обеспечивают комфортную температуру. Близость к центру и всем кафешкам.
reviews.negatives:
1. Полотенца хоть и плотные, но есть с дырками, местами порваные. Но свой основной функционал выполняют. Поэтому это незначительный минус.
2. Немного удивил персонал, я заплатил за 2 дня проживания  VND 973947, а на сайте booking было написано VND 861 900. Я спорить не стал, поскольку мы на 2 дня заселялись и у нас была насыщенная программа. А так конечно неприятно. И ещё мы приехали в 11-00, и конечно нас сразу не заселили, но я оплату я произвёл полностью. Далее мы пошли гулять, а вернувшись ближе 15-00, другой работник отеля опять начал просит код бронирования и что-то там ещё... Мне кажется странно это... Но в целом все хорошо закончилось. 
3. Это конечно же не серьёзный минус, но хотелось бы после бассейна в сауне посидеть, судя по всему, сауна есть, но она закрыта была.

reviews.title: Bedbugs in the hotel
reviews.positives: The location was ok. Also this is not a 4* hotel, max 3*.
reviews.negatives:
There were bedbugs in my room. I sat in the armchair, and after half an hour my entire back was covered in bites. I reported this to the front desk, and they weren’t even surprised or apologetic. It felt like they were already aware of the bedbug problem.

They replaced the armchair with a rusty metal chair — the kind you usually see outdoors. Apparently, there were bedbugs in the bed as well, because I woke up the next morning with new bite marks.

I had a reservation for another night, so I asked to change rooms. I should also mention that the reception staff — especially the woman who introduced herself as the hotel manager (in reality, she is the front desk manager; her name and badge are attached) — was extremely rude and aggressive.

She tried to blame everything on me, claiming that I just didn’t like the room and that I was simply having an allergic reaction, which was “my problem.” She even said that if I had the same issue in the new room, she would not help me anymore! The call that help!

As you can see, they have no shame or conscience. According to them, it’s the guest’s fault for being bitten by bedbugs. The level of rudeness is unbelievable.

I left the hotel.

reviews.title: Confortable, Accomodating, definitly worth the price but quite some room for improvement
reviews.positives:
The staff can be very accomodating
Gave me a choice of rooms
Had one with a huge angled desk, 
I ask if I could have 1 semi-office chair like the ones that the staff had and they quite litterally asked me which one i wanted to choose here and now, so great
Also had a huge bathtub (i dont like it but for those who do)
If you want the beach its not even 5 min walk.
Very affordable price (as genius 3 free breakfast included it was 430 euros for 32 night so 14 a night very low season)
reviews.negatives:
On the one hand the staff can be very accomodating but also very lazy particularly the breakfast staff.
Some of the choices were not refilled (like ice, or mayonnaise, etc had to ask them to do it)
Also spend the better part of the first 2 weeks to try and teach them NOT to cook the yolk of an egg (either sunny side up or over easy) had to resort to tell them to separate the white and the yolk and just cook the white ^^
The Heat management of the dishes was abyssmal : the juice could be hot while the rice and meat was cold ...
Had to ask every .... single .... day .... to reheat my plate in the kitchen once i served myself.
But once and while my plate came back with a piece of fried chicken or some bacon (that were not on the menu) to apologize (i suppose) ^^
There was an issue with the location on booking not matching the real one i hope it has been fixed.
Is not quite as central as advertise. I had to use "grab" every time i wanted to go downtown.
I gave up on trying to personnalise water pressure and temperature (was on 15 floor maybe it didn't help)

reviews.title: Brilliant hôtel
reviews.text:
L hôtel est bien situé et propre.
Cependant le check-in express est un mensonge. Nous sommes arrivés à 6h30 du matin, fatigués du voyage de nuit en bus, j ai demandé de récupérer la chambre en avance même s il fallait payer, on me l à refusé, en me stipulant que cela ne se faisait pas alors qu il est bien indiqué dans les services de l Hôtel sur Agoda. 

Le matin de notre départ, le 15/05/26, à 8h30 du matin j ai demandé à la réception de m appeler un taxi, le garçon m a dit qu à cette heure là les taxi ne rentraient pas dans cette rue et la fille m à répété bêtement ses dites. (je suis vietnamien et connais très bien mon pays, je sais que leurs dites étaient seulement dus à de la fainéantise et un manque de professionnalisme). 
J ai appelé un GRAB, en 2 mn il est arrivé dans la rue. 

Je trouve le comportement de ces 2 jeunes gens déplorable. Ils ne sont fait pour occuper un poste de réceptionniste d hôtel. Je viens au vietnam toutes les années, du nord au sud donc imaginez tous les hôtels dans lesquels je suis allé... 
Ceci est un cas isolé bien sûr...

reviews.title: Strandnah
reviews.text:
Preis Leistung ist unschlagbar.  
Hier ist hotspot mit vielen russischen Mitbürgern. 
Essen in der Nähe null local Food. 
Mit dem Grab 1 km in die Stadt und es ist lokaler und ruhiger.  
Strand ist wunderbar morgens bevor die saufenden Russen an den Strand wackeln. 
Was Mallorca für die Deutschen ist ist wohl nah trang für die Russen.  😛

reviews.title: A beautiful, clean and smart hotel.
reviews.positives: Simple but comfortable. Staff were very friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: Sehr zufrieden
reviews.text: Ich habe meinen Aufenthalt sehr genossen. Nachts war es sehr ruhig in meinem Zimmer. Ich konnte problemlos schlafen. Das Personal an der Rezeption konnte mäßig englisch, mit Übersetzer ist es allerdings kein Problem. Der Pool ist nicht beheizt. Es kann also etwas kühl werden, wenn man nur chillt. Das Frühstück war mit ausreichender Auswahl sehr lecker. Transfer zum Flughafen ging auch ohne Probleme. Ich komme gerne wieder.

reviews.title: Excellent breakfast and lovely staff! Def would recommend!

reviews.title: Nettes Hotel für einen kurzen Aufenthalt direkt an der Touristen Promenade
reviews.text: Grundsätzlich für den Preis ein solides Hotelzimmer. Klein, sauber, in dem Fall ohne Fenster aber mit Pool Benutzung. Infinity ist dabei nicht ganz zutreffend. Es gibt die Möglichkeit ein Mofa zu mieten, unseres ist jedoch auf dem Weg kaputt gegangen, eine funktionierende Geschwindigkeitsanzeige gab es auch nicht. Die Reparaturkosten hat das Hotel übernommen. Lage zentral, man muss sich aber bewusst machen, dass man mitten im Touristen Zentrum ist.
